source: Vibe UI recipes distilled from upstream source skill and template patterns

templates.name: Vibe UI SaaS landing recipe
templates.description: A compact recipe for product-led SaaS landing pages with strict section identity, proof, and self-review.
requiredSections: Hero with product name, literal value proposition, one primary CTA, one secondary CTA, and visible product proof
Credibility strip with real integrations, customers, or neutral proof placeholders that do not invent metrics
Feature narrative with 3-5 concrete workflow modules instead of generic benefit cards
Product walkthrough or how-it-works section with sequential steps and UI states
Use-case or audience section that maps product capability to user roles
Pricing teaser or conversion block aligned to the selected DESIGN.md rhythm
FAQ and final CTA using the same visual system as the hero
layoutNotes: Give every top-level section a stable data-od-id for review and iteration
Use DESIGN.md colors, typography, spacing, radius, shadows, and density as the single source of truth
Use real product nouns and interface language; avoid lorem ipsum, fake 10x claims, and generic AI copy
Keep decorative media subordinate to product inspection unless DESIGN.md explicitly calls for editorial imagery
p0SelfCheck: Every visible color is a DESIGN.md token or clearly derived from it
No default LLM indigo, emoji-as-icon, invented metric, or placeholder copy remains
Hero, features, walkthrough, pricing/CTA, FAQ, and final CTA are present
Layout works at desktop and mobile widths without overlapping text or controls
Brand-safe: no copied logos, proprietary assets, official claims, or affiliation language

templates.name: Vibe UI dashboard recipe
templates.description: A dense but readable operational dashboard recipe for SaaS, finance, and productivity tools.
requiredSections: Persistent navigation with clear current location
Primary workflow header with search/filter/action affordances
Metric row with grounded labels and no invented growth claims
Main table, feed, chart, or kanban area matched to the product domain
Empty, loading, active, and error states where the local stack supports them
layoutNotes: Favor scan density over marketing composition
Use consistent row heights, grid tracks, and control sizes
Make filters and primary actions reachable without layout shift
p0SelfCheck: Information hierarchy is readable in 10 seconds
No decorative card nesting or oversized hero typography inside panels
Controls have stable dimensions and accessible labels

templates.name: Vibe UI docs recipe
templates.description: A documentation page recipe with navigable structure, code examples, and product-grade rhythm.
requiredSections: Docs shell with sidebar or top navigation
Article title, summary, and quick links
Callout or warning block using DESIGN.md component rules
layoutNotes: Prioritize reading width, type scale, and code block contrast
Avoid marketing decoration inside the article body
p0SelfCheck: Code blocks are readable on mobile
Links and callouts follow selected DESIGN.md tokens
